## Problem

What workflow is hard or missing?

## Proposed behavior

What should Oriel do?

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Privacy / security impact

Would this change affect captured activity, browser data, local storage,
exports, AI provider calls, Logo.dev calls, permissions, or logs?

## Additional context

Anything else that would help evaluate the request.
